retry_reason: Failure returns are deterministic (seq too old or invalid); retrying will not change the outcome.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is fence retrieval by sequence number with validation (bounds checking, NULL returns, ERR_PTR on invalid seq). The dma_fence_get call is one step within broader business logic that includes locking, sequence logic, and error handling.
judge.retry_reason: Failure returns are deterministic (seq too old or invalid); retrying will not change the outcome.
